recentDiscussion: [RFC] Native Execution Privacy in the Uniswap Interface via v4 Hooks and UniswapX (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/rfc-native-execution-privacy-in-the-uniswap-interface-via-v4-hooks-and-uniswapx/26208)
[Temp Check] Protocol Fee Expansion: Robinhood Chain (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/temp-check-protocol-fee-expansion-robinhood-chain/26168)

Foundation inspection request — Cantina bounty mediation policy enforcement (finding #784, 29-day stalled dispute) (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/foundation-inspection-request-cantina-bounty-mediation-policy-enforcement-finding-784-29-day-stalled-dispute/26160)
URC-4: Active Liquidity Framework Hook Interface (https://gov.uniswap.org/t/urc-4-active-liquidity-framework-hook-interface/26156)

headline.en: Rally into governance catalysts but net inflation and thin $4.68M volume expose UNI to a fade toward $3.20 support.
headline.zh: 涨势撞上治理催化剂, 但净通胀未解、日成交仅 $4.68M, UNI 大概率回撤至 $3.20 支撑区。

keyChanges.en: v4 Protocol Fees Temp Check went active — first credible revenue-expansion vote since UNIfication, alongside a parallel Robinhood Chain fee proposal.
keyChanges.zh: v4 Protocol Fees 温度检查正式启动 — 这是 UNIfication 之后首个真正指向收入端扩张的投票, 并与 Robinhood Chain 手续费提案并行推进。

keyChanges.en: Buyback budget still only $5.96M/yr vs 20M UNI emission worth $76.8M at spot; net supply grows +2.07%/yr — the burn narrative is mechanically not working.
keyChanges.zh: 回购预算年化仅 $5.96M, 对应 20M UNI 年增发按现价折合 $76.8M, 净供应仍以 +2.07%/年膨胀 — burn 叙事在机制层面根本没跑通。

keyChanges.en: Binance L/S ratio 1.87 with 0.00% funding on just $20.5M OI — retail is crowded long into a governance hope trade with zero derivative conviction.
keyChanges.zh: Binance L/S 比 1.87、funding 0.00%、OI 仅 $20.5M — 散户在治理博弈里拥挤做多, 衍生品端毫无共识。

contrarianObservation.en: If both v4 Protocol Fees and Robinhood Chain fee expansion clear Temp Check inside 30 days, annualized revenue plausibly doubles toward $70M+, flipping net emission negative near $8 UNI. Nothing in current price, OI, or funding is pricing that path — a smart long is buying the option, not the token.
contrarianObservation.zh: 若 v4 Protocol Fees 与 Robinhood Chain 手续费扩张 30 天内双双通过 Temp Check, 年化收入有望翻倍至 $70M+, 在 UNI ~$8 附近即可将净通胀翻转为通缩。当前价格、OI 与 funding 完全没在给这条路径定价 — 聪明的多头买的是这张期权, 不是币本身。

watchNext.en: v4 Protocol Fees Temp Check outcome and quorum — the single biggest revenue variable this quarter.
watchNext.zh: v4 Protocol Fees 温度检查的结果与投票率 — 本季度最关键的收入变量。

watchNext.en: Whether any staker-redirect / real-yield RFC re-surfaces on the forum; currently absent from top threads, which is a bearish tell for the DCF re-rating thesis.
watchNext.zh: 论坛是否重新出现 staker 分红 / real-yield RFC 提案; 目前前列讨论完全缺席, 这对 UNI 现金流资产重估叙事是明确的利空信号。

watchNext.en: Volume and OI expansion — need daily volume above $10M and OI above $30M to validate the 7d +9.46% move as anything other than a low-liquidity drift.
watchNext.zh: 成交与 OI 是否放量 — 日成交需站上 $10M、OI 需突破 $30M, 才能证明本周 +9.46% 不是薄流动性下的漂移。

fullReasoning.en: UNI is running +9.46% on the week while BTC dominance climbs to 56.69% — that's real relative strength, but it printed on $4.68M of daily volume against a $2.4B market cap. That's not accumulation, that's a vacuum bid. The structural problem has not moved: at $3.84, the 17% buyback captures only $5.96M/yr of revenue against 20M UNI of emission worth $76.8M, so net supply still grows 2.07%/yr. The DAO's own treasury-burn implied fair value was $5.96, and price has spent months rejecting that level from below — that is the market's verdict on current cash flows, not a temporary discount. The governance calendar is the only reason not to short aggressively. Two live Temp Checks — v4 Protocol Fees and Robinhood Chain — target the revenue side directly. Critically, no real-yield or staker-redirect RFC appears in the top forum threads, meaning the narrative that would re-rate UNI as a cash-flow asset is quiet. Binance L/S 1.87 with flat funding says retail is long a governance hope trade with no leverage conviction behind it. The base rate for Temp Checks translating into sustained price action is poor. Fade rips toward $4.20-4.40, only reload the long thesis if v4 fees pass AND revenue prints actually double. Otherwise the higher-probability path over 2-4 weeks is a retest of $3.20.
fullReasoning.zh: UNI 周度 +9.46%, 同期 BTC dominance 攀升至 56.69%, 表面呈现相对强势, 但这个涨幅是在 $4.68M 日成交量对 $2.4B 市值的极度真空环境下打出来的 — 这不是承接盘, 是没卖盘。结构性问题一点没动: 现价 $3.84 下, 17% buyback 一年只兑现 $5.96M 收入, 对应 20M UNI 年增发按现价折合 $76.8M, 净供应仍以 +2.07%/年膨胀。DAO 通过国库销毁隐含的自我定价是 $5.96, 而市场用数月时间从下方拒绝这一水平, 这就是当前现金流的市场判决, 不是暂时性折价。治理日程是唯一让我不敢重仓做空的理由: 两个活跃 Temp Check — v4 Protocol Fees 与 Robinhood Chain 手续费扩张 — 直接指向收入端。但值得警觉的是, 论坛前列完全没有 real-yield 或 staker redirect 相关 RFC, 意味着能让 UNI 重估为现金流资产的核心叙事目前是哑火状态。Binance 永续 L/S 1.87、funding 0.00%, 说明散户在没有衍生品共识的前提下多头挤进治理博弈。历史上 Temp Check 转化为持续行情的胜率很差。策略上, 逢反弹至 $4.20-4.40 减仓, 只有当 v4 Protocol Fees 通过且收入真实翻倍时才重启多头论点, 否则未来 2-4 周更高概率是回测 $3.20。
